caption: A gamer is captured in a picture-in-picture overlay while playing the video game "MADDEN 23." The gameplay displays a football field with yellow and green turf, flanked by a crowd of spectators. On-screen text includes the game title "MADDEN 23," a score of "12" to "7," and a game clock showing "2nd 0:10" or "2nd 0:29." A playbook menu is open, showing options like "FOUR VERTICALS" and "PA DEEP CROSS," alongside a "PREVIOUS PLAY" section mentioning "MIKE BLITZ 0." The gamer, a young man with blonde hair wearing a dark shirt, is visible in a small window on the left, sitting in front of a computer monitor and wearing a headset. As the video progresses, a "SELECT A PLAY" prompt appears, and the user navigates the menu. Logos for Nike and the NFL are visible at the top of the screen.
